title: ANYDOOR PLACE COORDINATED ENTRY - 211info
text: YAMHILL COMMUNITY ACTION PARTNERSHIP ANYDOOR PLACE COORDINATED ENTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides housing-related coordinated entry. Services may include assistance with past-due rent and rental deposit support, ongoing housing assistance, connection to help with utilities, assistance with apartment searching, and referrals to shelters and other local resources. Also provides case management. 1317 NE Dustin Court McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older and families with minor children Hours: Phone and email: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 472-0712 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 472-0457 Main phone (855) 216-5289 Toll-free Main phone (503) 472-0712 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call to complete screening FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Yamhill County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-8pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Dustin Court is a cul-de-sac that was created for the YCAP building, so many GPS systems do not show this road. Enter "2170 NE Riverside Drive, McMinnville, OR" into a GPS system to get close to the building and from there, it is obvious where the YCAP building is. Without a GPS system: Turn onto SE Riverside Drive from SE Lafayette Road. Once on Riverside Drive, the building is about 200 yards down on the left. Services: Housing Related Coordinated Entry Housing Related Coordinated Entry * Homeless Families Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION AND ENERGY EDUCATION UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YAMHILL COMMUNITY ACTION PARTNERSHIP
